user.title: Connect to Simson Addon
user.description: Enter the URL of the Simson addon's local API. If the addon is running on this HA instance, the default should work.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Simson addon. Make sure it is running.

abort.already_configured: This Simson node is already configured.
abort.addon_not_ready: The Simson addon is not ready yet. Please start it first.
